summary: Fair show with a second set that picks up the pace but offers no highlights; recording quality is not addressed.
review: The reviewer describes the concert as a fair performance, noting that the second set gained momentum yet failed to produce any standout moments. No comments are made about the audio source or sound quality, leaving the recording aspect unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate (3‑star) review focusing on the musical performance with no mention of audio quality; rating reflects a fair show and unknown recording condition.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments about sound clarity, mix, or source type were provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set picked up the pace but overall lacked memorable highlights.
